build.beforeDevCommand: bash -lc 'for d in apps/masterd-shell masterd-shell ../masterd-shell; do if [ -f "$d/package.json" ]; then exec npm --prefix "$d" run dev; fi; done; echo "masterd-shell package.json not found" >&2; exit 1'
build.beforeBuildCommand: bash -lc 'for d in apps/masterd-shell masterd-shell ../masterd-shell; do if [ -f "$d/package.json" ]; then exec npm --prefix "$d" run build; fi; done; echo "masterd-shell package.json not found" >&2; exit 1'

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost
